  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent correctly identifies several internal contradictions in the technical content, including non-smooth claims contradicting Theorem 1 and accelerated O(1/T) rate contradicting the standard stochastic mirror-descent rate.",
    "RX.1": "The agent accurately points out that the uncertainty disclosure is lacking, as it does not provide clear evidence for its claims and relies on citations without years or full references.",
    "RX.3": "The agent correctly identifies that the scope adherence is mostly within the agreed J*(d), but notes one drift in the empirical evaluation section.",
    "RX.4": "The agent accurately points out that the downstream-harm avoidance is good, as it does not introduce new errors or fabrications, but notes a minor regression in the empirical evaluation section.",
    "RX.5": "The agent correctly identifies that the provenance and traceability are good, as every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {

    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9

  "blockers": []

rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identifies several internal contradictions in the technical content, including non-smooth claims contradicting Theorem 1 and accelerated O(1/T) rate contradicting the standard stochastic mirror-descent rate.
rationale.RX.1: The agent accurately points out that the uncertainty disclosure is lacking, as it does not provide clear evidence for its claims and relies on citations without years or full references.
rationale.RX.3: The agent correctly identifies that the scope adherence is mostly within the agreed J*(d), but notes one drift in the empirical evaluation section.
rationale.RX.4: The agent accurately points out that the downstream-harm avoidance is good, as it does not introduce new errors or fabrications, but notes a minor regression in the empirical evaluation section.
rationale.RX.5: The agent correctly identifies that the provenance and traceability are good, as every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
